title: General Mills Continues Advancing Its Accelerate Strategy
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--At the Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) 2022 Conference, General Mills (NYSE: GIS) highlighted its progress in advancing its Accelerate strategy to deliver profitable growth and top-tier shareholder returns. The company also reaffirmed its fiscal 2022 full-year financial guidance and provided an update on its second-half expectations. title: General Mills Leads Its Industry in America's Best Large Employers List by Forbes
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Forbes named General Mills to its America's Best Employers list. The company ranked #1 in its industry, leading the consumer-packaged goods sector.

title: General Mills (GIS) Up More Than 15% in 6 Months: Here's Why
text: General Mills (GIS) is on track with the Accelerate strategy to boost profitability and enhance shareholders' returns. The company's solid Pet segment sales are also a driver.
